children.heading: Establishment of priorities and criteria; publication in Federal Register
children.label: a Establishment of priorities and criteria; publication in Federal Register

children.text: annual research, demonstration, and service program priorities for making grants and contracts pursuant to ; andsection 11294 of this title
criteria based on merit for making such grants and contracts.

children.heading: Competitive selection process for grant or contract exceeding $50,000
children.label: b Competitive selection process for grant or contract exceeding $50,000
children.text: No grant or contract exceeding $50,000 shall be made under this subchapter unless the grantee or contractor has been selected by a competitive process which includes public announcement of the availability of funds for such grant or contract, general criteria for the selection of recipients or contractors, and a description of the application process and application review process.

children.heading: Multiple grants or contracts to same grantee or contractor
children.label: c Multiple grants or contracts to same grantee or contractor
children.text: Multiple grants or contracts to the same grantee or contractor within any 1 year to support activities having the same general purpose shall be deemed to be a single grant for the purpose of this subsection, but multiple grants or contracts to the same grantee or contractor to support clearly distinct activities shall be considered separate grants or contractors.1So in original. Probably should be “contracts.”1
